case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. TALAMELEKE ALE ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ALE, TALAMELEKE DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-20-2020

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200007496), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED FEB-15-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE FEB-18-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT ALE, TALAMELEKE

DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200006608) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALE, TALAMELEKE $1,291.22 PRINCIPAL, $364.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,655.22, SEE SCANNED DOC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $364.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200010647) AS TO DEFENDANT ALE, TALAMELEKE
